title: PitCraft
description: A modpack inspired by All of Fabric.
body:
PitCraft is a modpack inspired by [All the Fabric](https://modrinth.com/modpack/atfb).

The goal of the modpack is to provide an experience where people can focus on different things and never get bored, by using QoL mods (like Waystones, chest organization, etc.) along with bigger mods that can give a whole new feeling to every player (like [Tech Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/techreborn), [Industrial Revolution](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/industrial-revolution), Create, Botania, etc.).
With time, some items may be removed from the modpack, to better balance the bigger mods.

Feel free to suggest improvements!
